mapper.select: SELECT id::text, user_id::text, type, content, tags::text AS tags, source::text AS source, content_hash, status, index_status, created_at, updated_at FROM memory_item WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

SELECT id::text, user_id::text, type, content, tags::text AS tags, source::text AS source, content_hash, status, index_status, created_at, updated_at FROM memory_item WHERE (status = 'active' AND index_status IN ('pending','failed')) OR (status = 'archived' AND index_status != 'removed') ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id::text, user_id::text, type, content, tags::text AS tags, source::text AS source, content_hash, status, index_status, created_at, updated_at FROM memory_item WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid)

SELECT id::text, user_id::text, type, content, tags::text AS tags, source::text AS source, content_hash, status, index_status, created_at, updated_at FROM memory_item WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND status = #{status} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memory_item ( user_id, type, content, tags, source, content_hash, status, index_status ) VALUES ( CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{type}, #{content}, CAST(#{tagsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{sourceJson} AS jsonb), #{contentHash}, #{status}, #{indexStatus} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, type, content_hash) DO UPDATE SET tags = EXCLUDED.tags, source = EXCLUDED.source, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE memory_item SET index_status = #{indexStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)

UPDATE memory_item SET type = #{type}, content = #{content}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, index_status = 'pending', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND status = 'active' AND updated_at = #{expectedUpdatedAt}
UPDATE memory_item SET status = 'active', index_status = 'pending', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND status = 'archived'
UPDATE memory_item SET status = 'archived', index_status = 'pending', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid) AND user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND status = 'active'
